recommendation_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD — the date the recommendation was issued

score_at_recommendation.description: Composite score (0-100) at time of recommendation

price_at_recommendation.description: Stock price when the recommendation was issued

status.description: Evaluation status — pending until 7/30 day check is done

price_7d.description: Stock price 7 days after recommendation (null if not yet evaluated)

price_30d.description: Stock price 30 days after recommendation (null if not yet evaluated)

result_7d.description: 7-day result: win = profit >3%, loss = loss >3%, neutral = within ±3%

result_30d.description: 30-day result: win = profit >3%, loss = loss >3%, neutral = within ±3%

report_id.description: Reference to the DailyReport this recommendation came from
